title: KelpCraft
description: 250+ Mods including Cobblemon, Create, Mob and Biome overhaul/additions, RPG aspects, QoL, Stunning Visuals, and MORE!!
body:
KelpCraft 🌿
An expansive adventure and creativity-focused modpack for Fabric 1.20.1

Overview
Dive into a fully customized Minecraft experience with KelpCraft, a meticulously curated modpack featuring 250+ mods that transform every aspect of the game. Whether you're an adventurer, builder, Pokémon trainer, or tech enthusiast, KelpCraft offers a little something for everyone. With a mix of stunning visuals, immersive gameplay, and endless possibilities, this pack is designed for both solo and multiplayer fun.

Features
✨ Adventure & Exploration

Discover breathtaking worlds with mods like Terralith, Biomes O' Plenty, and Oh The Biomes You'll Go, combined with overhauled structures from YUNG’s Better Mods and When Dungeons Arise.
Battle challenging bosses and uncover hidden treasures with AdventureZ, DungeonZ, and Deeper and Darker.
⚙️ Create Your Way

Embrace your inner engineer with the Create mod and its addons like Steam 'n' Rails, Slice & Dice, and Big Cannons. Automate your world and push the limits of your imagination.
🎮 Cobblemon

Catch, train, and battle Pokémon in Minecraft with Cobblemon, along with sidemods like Cobblemon: Legends Untold and Cobblemon Industrialized to enhance your Pokémon journey.
🌍 RPG-Like Progression

Equip custom armor and weapons from Simply Swords, Immersive Armors, and Mythic Metals.
Upgrade your tools with Mythic Upgrades and Advanced Netherite.
👀 Stunning Visuals

Immerse yourself in a breathtaking world with Complementary Shaders, Falling Leaves, Presence Footsteps, and Fresh Animations.
Dynamic lighting, vibrant biomes, and reimagined entities bring the world to life.
🏡 Quality of Life Enhancements

Simplify crafting and gameplay with Jade, Traveler's Backpack, Inventory Profiles Next, and AppleSkin.
Manage your loot and builds with Lootr, Visual Workbench, and RightClickHarvest.
Why Choose KelpCraft?
KelpCraft offers a balanced blend of adventure, creativity, and performance. With an optimized setup for 280+ mods, it ensures smooth gameplay without sacrificing depth. Explore, automate, battle, and build in a world where every corner holds something new.

Key Mods Included
Adventure Mods: YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Better Strongholds, DungeonZ, AdventureZ, Illager Invasion
World & Biomes: Terralith, Tectonic, Biomes O' Plenty, Bumblezone
Pokémon Experience: Cobblemon, Cobblepedia, Fight or Flight, Spawn Notifications
Tech & Creativity: Create, Create Crafts & Additions, Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Alloy Forgery
Immersion: Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered, Better Combat
RPG Enhancements: Mythic Metals, Immersive Armors, Simply Swords, Deeper and Darker
Recommended Settings
RAM: Allocate 8–12GB for smooth performance.
Shaders: Use Iris Shaders with Complementary Shaders for the best visual experience.
Multiplayer Ready: Fully compatible with servers, optimized for Simple Voice Chat and Dynamic FPS.
